signals.signal_title: 40% Permian production automated; ruthless automation mandate
signals.signal_description: CEO Vicki Hollub's ruthless automation mandate — 40% of Permian production now runs via automated AI/IoT field operations, driving ~9% reduction in domestic opex per BOE. Board reviews AI use cases annually per proxy statement.
signals.source: OXY FY2024 proxy and annual report

signals.signal_title: CrownRock $12B acquisition closed; active IT integration
signals.signal_description: CrownRock acquisition closed Aug 2024 for $12B, adding significant Midland Basin scale. Active multi-year IT integration of CrownRock systems into OXY infrastructure — ERP, field automation, and data platforms.

signals.signal_title: Richard Jackson promoted SVP and COO Oct 2025
signals.signal_description: Richard Jackson promoted to SVP and COO Oct 2025 with mandate to advance subsurface characterization, cost efficiencies and integrated technology value across global operations.

signals.signal_title: STRATOS DAC plant operational — world's largest
signals.signal_description: STRATOS direct air capture plant now operational — world's largest DAC facility in Permian Basin. Complex OT/IT infrastructure for carbon capture operations creates new IT investment area.

enrichment_notes: Major E&P with OxyChem chemicals (sold to Berkshire Hathaway Oct 2025, $9.7B) and low-carbon ventures. Houston HQ (STOLA, no channel mismatch). FY2024 revenue $26.72B, ~12,000 employees. CIO: Yanni Charalambous, VP and CIO — 20+ years IT and cybersecurity at OXY, reports directly to CEO Vicki Hollub. CIO briefs full Board on cybersecurity per 10-K disclosure. CEO Vicki Hollub drives ruthless automation — 40% of Permian production automated. CrownRock acquisition ($12B, Aug 2024) = active multi-year IT integration demand. New COO Richard Jackson promoted Oct 2025 with technology-forward mandate. STRATOS DAC plant operational 2025. No confirmed MSP. No OEM direct. ms_standardized=false. ai_maturity=13 — strong automation mandate, below ≥15 threshold. WWT angle: CrownRock IT integration (active), OT/cybersecurity (CIO owns it), low-carbon tech infrastructure (STRATOS DAC), Permian automation expansion.
